prompt: Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor

inputData.question: Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor"},"startedAt":1771855338568,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor. I need to join course_evaluations → enrollments → course_sections → professors, then group by professor and calculate the average of overall_rating. The professor name should be constructed from first_name and last_name.","sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS average_overall_rating
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY average_overall_rating DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC
","assumptions":["Assumes overall_rating in course_evaluations is the metric for 'overall course evaluation rating'","Joins through enrollments and course_sections to connect evaluations to professors","Rounds the average to 2 decimal places for readability","Orders results by average rating descending, then by professor name for deterministic output"]},"endedAt":1771855371990},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS average_overall_rating
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY average_overall_rating DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC
"},"startedAt":1771855371994,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

visualization.title: Average Overall Course Evaluation Rating by Professor

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS average_overall_rating
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY average_overall_rating DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC

visualization.title: Average Overall Course Evaluation Rating by Professor

result.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS average_overall_rating
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY average_overall_rating DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC
